# Our funding

Our funding philosophy is shaped by research, community-informed feedback, and the legacy established by our founder, Ewing Marion Kauffman. It is also grounded in a four-pillar framework of **proximity to community**, **getting uncomfortable**, **achieving impact**, and **creating hope**.

[Learn more about our philosophy](https://www.kauffman.org/funding/#philosophy)

### Explore

- #### [Grantmaking](https://www.kauffman.org/funding/grants/)

- #### [Sponsorships](https://www.kauffman.org/funding/sponsorships/)

- #### [Awards](https://www.kauffman.org/funding/awards/)


* * *

## Our grantmaking approach

### Over the next 10 years, we are committed to closing economic mobility gaps in Kansas City.

Our approach to grantmaking - YouTube

Tap to unmute

[Our approach to grantmaking](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7PKUuXmoPsM) [Kauffman Foundation](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC7m6vQ1ASO89SUqafM_t8Pg)

![thumbnail-image](https://yt3.ggpht.com/ytc/AIdro_lmeIbY-JabT7b2ckS0P68UWBlmhAmZvzWpr6QeuoyDxA=s68-c-k-c0x00ffffff-no-rj)

Kauffman Foundation8.42K subscribers

[Watch on](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7PKUuXmoPsM)

WATCH: “Our approach to grantmaking” \| 4:49

- We are committed to a focused, coherent, research-informed strategy to reach our goals.
- We seek projects that ignite potential and drive uncommon results through bold innovation, collective impact, transparency, and accountability.
- We support local, regional, and national changemakers to unlock learner potential, clear the path and remove barriers, and rethink the future of work and learning.
- We seek to be a model for learning by engaging and listening to local and national organizations, sharing our successes and failures, and continuously adapting our work in response to feedback and evaluation.

> We are more dedicated than ever to doing hard things – even if uncomfortable – for the sake of innovation and possibility.
>
> — Dr. DeAngela Burns-Wallace
>
> President and CEO, Kauffman Foundation

* * *

## **Our funding priorities & focus areas**

### Strategic priorities

Together with our community, we believe we can shift the landscape in three strategies — [college access and completion, workforce and career development, and entrepreneurship](https://www.kauffman.org/strategic-priorities/) — prioritized because of their anticipated power to advance economic mobility.

[Download to learn more](https://www.kauffman.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Kauffman_Grantmaking_approach_p1.pdf)

### Focus areas

In alignment with these priorities, we are seeking projects at the intersection of innovation and impact through the focus areas of **essential competencies and skills**, **education and employer connection**, **participation and belonging**, and **equitable access**.

[Download to learn more](https://www.kauffman.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Kauffman_Grantmaking_focus-areas_p2.pdf)

## Explore our funding opportunities

[![2024 Capacity Building grantee, Pathway Financial](https://www.kauffman.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/korg_grants_pathway-financial_02.jpg?resize=1600%2C1067)](https://www.kauffman.org/funding/grants/)

## Grantmaking

We offer grants through an ongoing cycle. The funding amounts, grant terms, and application criteria vary by type.

[Learn more about our grant opportunities](https://www.kauffman.org/funding/grants/)

## Sponsorships

Each year, we dedicate specific funds to sponsor events that connect people and raise funding for vital programs that are aligned with our mission.

[Learn more about our sponsorship opportunities](https://www.kauffman.org/funding/sponsorships/)

[![A TEDxKC attendee participates in the Kauffman Foundation acrylic heart installation at the Kauffman Center for Performing Arts](https://www.kauffman.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/web_funding_banner_photo_03.jpg?resize=1600%2C1100)](https://www.kauffman.org/funding/sponsorships/)

[![Mr. Kauffman](https://www.kauffman.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/kauffman_award_photo.jpg?resize=1370%2C930)](https://www.kauffman.org/funding/awards/)

## Awards

We recognize and celebrate community champions and bold changemakers having impact in the Kansas City area.

[Learn more about our award opportunities](https://www.kauffman.org/funding/awards/)

[Back to Top](https://www.kauffman.org/funding/#masthead)
